name: action-synchronize-branches
description: GitHub Action to synchronize the checked out branch in multi-repo builds

scripts.prebuild: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run clean
scripts.build: esbuild src/main.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --sourcemap --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
